educations.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science

description: Contributed to an internal RAG-based document search prototype for insurance policy and claims documentation, helping reduce manual document lookup time by ~40% in internal user testing across a pilot group of 15 underwriters.
Worked with the Generative AI team on RAG applications integrated with vector database FAISS to index ~15K unstructured policy documents.
Used LangChain and OpenAI APIs to build proof-of-concept retrieval and Q&A workflows, iterating on prompt design and evaluation to achieve ~85% answer relevance on a 200-question internal benchmark.
Designed real-time and batch ETL/Data Pipelines using PySpark, Apache Kafka, and Apache Airflow for processing large-scale structured and unstructured data.
Developed and deployed AI/ML models supporting player behavior prediction, content recommendation, churn analysis, and gaming analytics using Python, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, and LightGBM.
Designed and deployed recommendation models using PyTorch and TorchRec, reducing model inference latency by ~35% through optimization and serving improvements.
Contributed to end-to-end MLOps pipelines using Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, and MLflow, supporting faster release cadence for Fortnite's Discovery ranking models.

Developed data preprocessing and feature engineering pipelines on Databricks using Pandas, NumPy, SQL, and PySpark, processing 5TB+ of gameplay data and reducing daily training job runtime from 6 hours to 2 hours.
Ran 8–10 A/B experiments across tenure; implemented model versioning and experiment tracking using MLflow and DVC.

Built ML models using Scikit-learn, XGBoost, and LightGBM for anomaly detection and fault classification on equipment telemetry, improving fault classification accuracy from ~76% to ~84% across ~2,000 deployed network elements.
Performed time-series forecasting using ARIMA and Prophet to support internal revenue and demand planning, reducing forecast error on a key product line from ~15% to ~11%.
Built ETL pipelines using Apache Spark, Hive, SQL, and Apache Airflow handling ~10GB of weekly data, improving pipeline runtime by ~40% through partitioning and query optimization.
Created Power BI dashboards and automated reports for engineering and finance stakeholders, reducing manual reporting effort by 6–8 hours per week.
